text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 

126 
IPPS_FLEX_PYMT_6_AMT 
LABEL: 
Flexible Payment Amount (6th) — renamed to Hospital Acquired Conditions (HAC) Reduction Payment 
Amount 
DESCRIPTION: This field identifies the reduction in payment amount from the IPPS payment for hospitals that rank in 
the lowest-performing quartile of selected Hospital Acquired Conditions (HAC). 
SHORT NAME: IPPS_FLEX_PYMT_6_AMT 
LONG NAME:
